# Prefera

> Prefera makes local businesses visible across Google Search, Google Business Profile, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI Overviews. Audit, fix, maintain. Founded by Golnoosh, based in Utrecht, Netherlands.

## Services

- [Google Business Profile](https://prefera.dev/#services): The first thing your customers see. We keep it complete, active, and ranking in the map pack.
- [Local SEO](https://prefera.dev/#services): The signals that tell search engines you are the right answer for people nearby.
- [AI Search Visibility](https://prefera.dev/#services): ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews are replacing search results. We make sure they cite you.
- [AI Voice Assistant](https://prefera.dev/#services): Answers calls. Books appointments. Speaks your customer's language. Works 24 hours, never calls in sick.

## How it works

- Audit: We check every channel: Google, Maps, ChatGPT, Perplexity. You get a scorecard and a fix list.
- Fix: We fix your GBP, structure your site, and make your business readable by AI.
- Maintain: Posts, monitoring, tracking, and a monthly call. No autopilot.

## Contact

- Email: info@prefera.dev
- Booking: https://prefera.dev/book
- Location: Utrecht, Netherlands
- Languages: English, Dutch, Farsi
